lessons.title: Watangaho, wamonaho, tahinyi wevwaho lyehi mujimbu wakwivwishile kuwaha chipwe
Kweseka nomu watangile, wamwene chipwe wevwile, chinyingi muka wawanyinemo?
topics: MUTWE WACHIHANDE 1: KULUMBUNUNA LIZU LYA LITILICHA

lessons.title: Litilicha inapu uhashi wakuzachisa lilimi nakusolola katwamino kavathu.
Litilicha chapwa chitalilo chakatwamino kavathu muchitungilo.
Litilicha anapu mazu awa akusoneka kanawa mangana asangumune vishinganyeka vyamuthu
Litilicha vinapu vishinganyeka vyakutaka kuzachisa lilimi mangana isosolole nakuhilula
Litilicha inapu mijimbu yayihi, mikunyi navihemo chikumanyi vize vili naulemu kechi
Litilicha unapu mulimo wavisonejeka nautala havyuma vyakutaka muvishinganyeka
topics: vyamukakusoneka navyuma vyakuhona kutaka navihana ulemu hachisemwa chavathu.
SETEKO YAKUNANGAKANA: Kutanjika jilumbunwiso ja Litilicha mukutesama.
§ Alweze valongi vatanjike jilumbunwiso ja Litilicha jakuliseza-seza.

lessons.title: Valongi vasoneke jilumbunwiso jalizu Litilicha mumikanda yavo.
Valongi vayenga mukatunda kamikanda chipwe kuzachisa makina amyaka ino mangana vawane
topics: jilumbunwiso ja Litilicha jakuliseza-seza mulilimi lya Ingilishi nakujalumuna mu Luvale.
Chihande echi, valongi vanatanjika lumbunwiso yalizu Litilicha mujijila jakulihandununa. Kaha
nawa, vanalumbununa jilumbunwiso ja Litilicha. Chamakumishilo, vanalumbununa Litilicha.

lessons.title: Litilicha inapu uhashi wakuzachisa lilimi nakusolola katwamino kavathu.
Litilicha chapwa chitalilo chakatwamino kavathu muchitungilo.
Litilicha anapu mazu awa akusoneka kanawa mangana asangumune vishinganyeka vyamuthu
Litilicha vinapu vishinganyeka vyakutaka kuzachisa lilimi mangana isosolole nakuhilula
Litilicha inapu mijimbu yayihi, mikunyi navihemo chikumanyi vize vili naulemu kechi
Litilicha unapu mulimo wavisonejeka nautala havyuma vyakutaka muvishinganyeka
topics: vyamukakusoneka navyuma vyakuhona kutaka navihana ulemu hachisemwa chavathu.
SETEKO YAKUNANGAKANA: Kusandulula jilumbunwiso ja Litilicha jakuliseza-seza
VYAKULINGA 2: KULIFWANA NACHIHANDWA CHAJILUMBUNWISO JA LITILICHA

lessons.title: Valongi vahunanane jilumbunwiso ja Litilicha kweseka nachinyingi vanalinangula
topics: Muchilongeselo echi, valongi vanashindakanya, vanawane kulifwana nachihandwa cha lizu Litilicha.
Kuhakilaho nawa vanasambisa jilumbunwiso jalizu Litilicha.

lessons.title: Valongi vatunge jilumbunwiso ja Litilicha javo nakujihakwila.
topics: Muchilongeselo echi, valongi vanatungu nakusambisa jilumbunwiso javo ja Litilicha.

lessons.title: Tunga jilumbunwiso jikwavo ja Litilicha yakuhanjika.
Soneka Miyachi ya Litilicha yakuhanjika nakuyilumbununa.
Fwefwenya tuthachijilo tukwavo twa Litilicha yakuhanjika.
topics: Muchilongeselo chino, valongi vanalumbununa, vanatombola, vanahandununa nakutanjika vyuma
vyatwama mu Litilicha yakuhanjika. Kumakumishilo, valongi vanambulula cheka tuthachikijilo

lessons.title: Tunga jilumbunwiso jikwavo ja Litilicha yakusoneka.
Soneka Miyachi ya Litilicha yakusoneka nakuyilumbununa.
Fwefwenya tuthachijilo tukwavo twa Litilicha yakusoneka.
topics: Muchilongeselo chino, valongi vanalumbununa, vanatombola, vanahandununa nakutanjika vyuma
vyatwama mu Litilicha yakusoneka. Kumakumishilo, valongi vanambulula cheka tuthachikijilo

lessons.title: Soneka chihandwa chili ha Litilicha yakuhanjika na Litilicha yakusoneka.
Soneka kulifwana chili ha Litilicha yakuhanjika na Litilicha yakusoneka.
Soneka nakulumbununa ulemu uli ha Litilicha yakuhanjika na Litilicha yakusoneka.
topics: Muchilongeselo chino, munapu kutanjika kulifwana chili mukachi ka Litilicha yakuhanjika na
Litilicha yakusoneka. Chamuchivali, munapu cheka kutanjika chihandwa chihandwa chili
mukachi ka Litilicha yakuhanjika na Litilicha yakusoneka. Chamakumishilo, munapu nw
kusambisa ulemu wa Litilicha yakuhanjika na Litilicha yakusoneka.

lessons.title: Soneka nakulumbununa milimo ya Litilicha yakuhanjika.
Tako nakulumbununa chishimulonga unahase kuzachisa kukanda muthu nalingisa
Litilicha yakuhanjika jechi kuneha viseke. Unetavila tayinyi unakane?
Soneka nakulumbununa jijila jikwavo unahase kuzachishilamo Litilicha yakuhanjika
topics: mangana ukumise ukalu uli nakusefuka mungalila yenu.
Muchilongeselo chino, valongi vanatanjika, vanalumbununa nakusambisa milimo ya Litilicha
yakuhanjika. Chamakumishilo, valongi vanalumbununa jijila jakuzachisa Litilicha yakuhanjika

lessons.title: Soneka nakulumbununa milimo ya Litilicha yakusoneka.
Soneka nakulumbununa ulemu uli mu Litilicha yakuhanjika na Litilicha
Vyakulya vyamakumbi ano vili nakuneha misongo kuhambakana vaykulya
topics: Muchilongeselo chino, valongi vanatanjika, vanalumbununa nakusambisa milimo ya Litilicha
yakusoneka. Kuhakilaho, valongi vanalumbununa milimo ya Litilicha yakusoneka kukumisa
ukalu uli nakusefuka muvitungilo. Chamakumushilo, vanazachisa Litilicha yakusoneka

lessons.title: Kupanjika milimo ya Litilicha nachiyoyelo chavathu.
Mujila muka vikilikita vyachisemwa vyeji kusololangamo vinjikizo vya Litilicha.
Lumbununa mujila vyuma vyakutenga vyeji kukafwilangamo Litilicha
Vyuma vyakutenga mu Litilicha vyalipandama nachinyingi chakushikulu. Unetava
topics: Chilongeselo chino, valongi vanapanjika milimo yamu Litilicha yakufwana nge myaso,
vishimo, mijimbu navikwavo kuchiyoyelo chavathu. Chikwavo nawa, vanasondwesa

lessons.title: Tombola nakulumbununa miyachi ya Litilicha yakuhanjika.
Hana vitalilo vyamiyachi ya Litilicha yakuhanjika unatombola muchihula chatete.
topics: Muchilongeselo chino, valongi vanatombola miyachi ya Litilicha yakuhanjika. Cheka
nawa, vanalumbununa miyachi ya Litilicha yakuhanjika. Chamakumishilo, valongi
vanahana vinjikizo vyamiyachi ya Litilicha yakuhanjika.
